Title: TRIGGER
Feature: CREATE TRIGGER trigger_name BEFORE|AFTER|INSTEAD OF INSERT|UPDATE OF cols|DELETE ON table_name FOR EACH ROW|STATEMENT REFERENCING OLD|NEW AS alias WHEN (condition) begin_end_block
Description: Defines a row-level or statement-level trigger that automatically executes a procedure block when INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE events occur on a table or view.
Virtuoso supports BEFORE, AFTER, and INSTEAD OF triggers, and lets you reference OLD and NEW row images via the REFERENCING clause.
